name: 杭州
description: Hangzhou, the capital of Zhejiang Province, is famous for its natural beauty and historical culture. Home to West Lake, a UNESCO World Heritage site, and the ancient water town ambiance of the Grand Canal. Known as 'Paradise on Earth' for its mild climate, lush greenery, and elegant gardens. A leading tech hub as headquarters of Alibaba.

climate.tips: Best visited in spring for flowers or autumn for golden foliage. Summer is hot and humid with frequent rain. Spring rainy season (Meiyu) in June. Wear comfortable shoes for walking around West Lake.

attractions.name: 西湖
attractions.description: A UNESCO World Heritage site and the iconic heart of Hangzhou. A freshwater lake with surrounding gardens, pagodas, and causeways creating stunning landscapes.
attractions.address: West Lake Scenic Area, Xihu District
attractions.tips: Rent a bike to circle the lake. Take a boat ride to see the Three Pools. Visit Leifeng Pagoda at sunset. Spring for peach blossoms, autumn for lotus.

attractions.name: 西溪国家湿地公园
attractions.description: The largest urban wetland in China with unique ecosystem, traditional fishing villages, and serene natural beauty.
attractions.address: Xixi National Wetland Park, Xihu District
attractions.tips: Take the boat tour for best experience. Visit in early morning for fewer crowds. Combine with nearby West Lake.

attractions.name: 灵隐寺
attractions.description: One of the oldest and most famous Buddhist temples in China, dating back to 326 AD, with stunning architecture and rock carvings.
attractions.ticketPrice: 45 CNY (temple), additional 55 CNY for Feilai Feng peak
attractions.tips: Arrive early to avoid tour groups. The temple is at the foot of Feilai Feng. Wear modest clothing covering shoulders and knees.

attractions.name: 河坊街
attractions.description: A historic pedestrian street in Hangzhou with traditional Chinese architecture, local snacks, tea houses, and souvenir shops.
attractions.tips: Best visited in the evening when illuminated. Try Hangzhou local snacks like lotus root powder and steamed dumplings. Compare prices before buying souvenirs.

attractions.name: 京杭大运河
attractions.description: The longest ancient canal in the world, stretching 1794km from Beijing to Hangzhou. Hangzhou's section offers boat tours through historic water towns.
attractions.tips: Take an evening boat tour for romantic scenery. The bridge views are particularly beautiful at night.

attractions.name: 宋城
attractions.description: A theme park recreating Song Dynasty culture with performances, traditional architecture, and interactive experiences.
attractions.tips: Book tickets online in advance. The 'Legend of the Flying Nymphs' is spectacular. Arrive 30 minutes early for good seats.

attractions.name: 龙井村
attractions.description: Famous for Longjing (Dragon Well) tea, one of China's most prized green teas. Scenic tea plantations and traditional tea houses.
attractions.tips: Visit in early April for tea picking season. Buy tea directly from farmers for authenticity. The village is very peaceful in early morning.

attractions.name: 钱塘江
attractions.description: Famous for the world's largest tidal bore, with monthly tidal waves reaching up to 9 meters during the Mid-Autumn Festival.
attractions.tips: Best viewed during Mid-Autumn Festival (September-October) for the famous tidal bore. The bridge lighting at night is spectacular.

restaurants.name: 金沙厅
restaurants.address: 4/F, Four Seasons Hotel Hangzhou, 5 Lingjia Lane, Hubin Road
restaurants.description: One Michelin-starred Zhejiang cuisine with stunning West Lake views. Exceptional seafood and traditional Hangzhou dishes.
dishHighlights: West Lake gold fish in soup

restaurants.name: 外婆家
restaurants.description: Popular chain serving authentic Zhejiang home-style dishes at affordable prices. Great for trying local favorites.

restaurants.name: 知味观
restaurants.description: Historic restaurant established in 1913, famous for Hangzhou cuisine and traditional dim sum.

restaurants.name: 绿茶餐厅
restaurants.description: Trendy restaurant chain known for fresh ingredients and creative Zhejiang dishes in modern atmosphere.

restaurants.name: 奎元馆
restaurants.description: Legendary noodle house established in 1867, serving authentic Hangzhou style noodles with rich broth.

restaurants.name: 楼外楼
restaurants.description: Historic restaurant on the shore of West Lake, established 1848. Famous for view dining and traditional dishes.
dishHighlights: West Lake fish in vinegar sauce

restaurants.name: 龙井菜馆
restaurants.description: Traditional restaurant in tea country specializing in Longjing tea-infused dishes and organic local ingredients.

restaurants.name: 弄堂里
restaurants.description: Popular local chain known for authentic Zhejiang home cooking and comfortable dining environment.

arrival.from: Major international airports (Shanghai, Beijing, Hong Kong)
arrival.duration: Varies by origin (2-3 hours from Shanghai, 12+ from Europe)
arrival.frequency: Daily international flights from Seoul, Tokyo, Singapore, Bangkok
arrival.tips: Hangzhou Airport is 27km from city center. Airport shuttle bus to East Railway Station and West Lake area. High-speed rail from Shanghai is faster.

arrival.to: Hangzhou East Railway Station / Hangzhou Railway Station
arrival.tips: High-speed train from Shanghai is fastest and most convenient. Hangzhou East is near shopping districts. Hangzhou Station is closer to West Lake.

metro: 12 lines covering city center and suburbs
Single ride: 2-9 CNY depending on distance
West Lake area served by Lines 1, 2, 10
bus: Extensive network covering areas not served by metro
Single ride: 2 CNY (basic), higher for air-conditioned
Buses to West Lake from main tourist areas
taxi: Didi app recommended for English speakers
bike: Unlock: 1-2 CNY, then 0.5-1.5 CNY per 30 minutes
Designated bike lanes on West Lake surrounding roads
Scenic bike paths around West Lake

hotels.name: 杭州四季酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Book lakeside rooms for West Lake views. Restaurant reservations essential.

hotels.name: 杭州西子湖四季酒店
hotels.nameEn: Four Seasons Resort Hangzhou at West Lake
hotels.bookingTips: Exclusive resort experience. Book months ahead for holidays.

hotels.name: 杭州香格里拉酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Great location near West Lake. Weekend packages available.

hotels.name: 杭州君悦酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Best for business travelers. Check weekend rates.

hotels.name: 杭州西湖饭店
hotels.bookingTips: Book well in advance during peak season.

howToUse: Link international credit card or open Chinese account
tips: Works at all restaurants and shops

howToUse: Link international card through WeChat Pay

payment.description: Still useful at traditional markets and small vendors

culturalTips.title: Tea Culture
culturalTips.content: Hangzhou is famous for Longjing (Dragon Well) tea. Visit a tea house for authentic tea ceremony. Spring tea picking (April) is a special experience.

culturalTips.title: Dining Etiquette
culturalTips.content: West Lake vinegar fish and Dongpo pork are local specialties. Tipping is not expected. Restaurant service may be casual.

culturalTips.title: Clothing
culturalTips.content: Comfortable walking shoes essential for West Lake. Dress modestly for temple visits. Light layers for variable weather.

culturalTips.title: Best Times
culturalTips.content: Visit West Lake early morning or late evening to avoid crowds. Weekdays are less crowded than weekends. Spring (April-May) for flowers, autumn for foliage.

emergencyContacts.name: 杭州急救中心
emergencyContacts.notes: English interpretation available at major hospitals

emergencyContacts.name: 杭州市公安局
emergencyContacts.notes: Tourist police at West Lake area

emergencyContacts.name: 美国驻上海总领事馆
emergencyContacts.address: Shanghai (nearest US consular services for Hangzhou)
emergencyContacts.notes: For US citizens in Hangzhou region

quickFacts.water: Tap water safe after boiling; bottled water recommended
